title: Allocators: cross-thread order pipeline
notes: Producer pinned to core 4, consumer to core 5 (same CCX1 on Zen 2 3800X). Background pressure thread (T_bg) pinned to core 6 (same CCX1). Order struct: 64 B, alignas(64). End-to-end latency: rdtscp after allocate() → rdtscp after simulated risk check. Warmup: 100k items pre-roll per iteration. Paced: 1 MHz offered load, 1 M/s background pressure. Pressure sweep: 9 points (zero baseline + 8 log-spaced 100k–10M Hz).
